citations.content: a physical exam at the time of presentation to the hospital or at delivery

parentBlock.content: Assessment of the mother is conducted by the physician and/or the labor and delivery nurse. The assessment should include a review of any available medical records as well as a physical exam at the time of presentation to the hospital or at delivery. Results must be documented in the medical record.
